request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2024 Boston plot was stopped because we had the tools to track suspicious communications. Critics say these measures infringe on liberties, but in practice, they're used judiciously - 92% of monitored cases in 2025 were legitimate threats. We can't afford to weaken our defenses based on hypothetical concerns. #NationalSecurityMatters
